subcodes.first_line: Verily, the tongues of all beings have spoken forth to make mention of the Revealer of Verses, and every face hath been illumined
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطقت السن الکائنات بذکر منزل الایات و لاحت الوجوه من انوار وجهه العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God is its own standard, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
